_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 52: Notification of GPAI Models with Systemic Risk
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 52 (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Timely Notification to Commission
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST notify the Commission without delay and no later than 2 weeks after the GPAI model meets the systemic risk criteria.
requirements.rationale: Art. 52(1) mandates notification within 2 weeks of meeting classification criteria.
acceptable_implementations: Formal notification letter submitted to EU AI Office within 14 days
Automated threshold monitoring with notification trigger workflow
Compliance calendar with notification deadline tracking

requirements.title: Notification Content Completeness
requirements.requirement: The notification MUST include sufficient information to demonstrate that the GPAI model meets the systemic risk criteria.
requirements.rationale: Art. 52 requires the notification to contain evidence supporting the classification determination.
acceptable_implementations: Notification package with FLOPs calculation and training documentation
Structured notification form with capability assessment results
Comprehensive submission with model card and technical specifications

requirements.title: Rebuttal Process Readiness
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST be prepared to present sufficiently substantiated arguments for rebuttal if the provider considers the model does not meet systemic risk criteria despite exceeding the FLOPs threshold.
requirements.rationale: Art. 52(2) grants providers the right to present arguments that their model should not be classified as systemic risk.
acceptable_implementations: Documented rebuttal case with technical evidence of limited capability scope
Independent assessment report supporting non-systemic-risk classification
Structured argumentation framework aligned with Annex XIII criteria

scoring.compliant: R01 + R02 met, R03 if applicable
